title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 242.100 - Procedure after notice of reorganization
text:
242.100.  Procedure after notice of reorganization. — After said notice has been so given the matter shall be proceeded with in the same manner as is provided for where articles of association for the formation of a drainage district have been filed.
(RSMo 1939 § 12382) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10801; 1919 § 4431
